chapter.subject: mathematics
chapter.title: Probability
syllabusOutline: Equally likely outcomes and classical probability
Coins tossing, dice rolling, cards deck outcomes
chapter.studySummary:
## Syllabus outline
- Equally likely outcomes and classical probability
- Complementary events math
- Coins tossing, dice rolling, cards deck outcomes

Pedagogical concepts and learning benchmarks for Class 10 active curriculum.

videos.title: Probability Class 10 Maths Chapter 15 One Shot 🎲
milestones: Equally likely outcomes and classical probability
Coins tossing, dice rolling, cards deck outcomes

transcripts.text: Probability always lies between 0 and 1 inclusive: 0 <= P(E) <= 1.
Card deck contains 52 cards: 26 red, 26 black. Red: 13 hearts, 13 diamonds. Black: 13 spades, 13 clubs. Face cards: 12 (J, Q, K).

scholarTips: When tossing three coins simultaneously, total outcomes is 2^3 = 8. (HHH, HHT, HTH, HTT, THH, THT, TTH, TTT).
Rolling two dice simultaneously: total outcomes is 6^2 = 36. Sum of 11 holds outcome (5,6), (6,5) = 2/36!
chapter.disclaimer: AI-generated study guide (VOLTAIC). Not official CBSE/NCERT. Verify facts with your textbook and teacher.
